headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -37.9)
key_insights: Fears trending down 1% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 148 quotes and an overwhelming 114 at strong intensity, driving a score of 39.2 — people are venting forcefully today.
• The frustrations score sits in the upper third of its 157-day range, well above the floor of -1.7, though still far from the peak of 166.6.
• Fears edged slightly less negative than yesterday (-20.9 vs -23.7), while Optimism softened further and is now near the bottom of its historical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
